prompt: Using REFERENCE_0 as the visual style reference only, transform the surreal glossy macro studio aesthetic into a single pink betta fish. Remove the mouths, teeth, tennis ball, jewelry, and mirror reflection entirely. Keep the high-contrast black background, dramatic wet-looking highlights, close-up product-photography lighting, and hyper-detailed texture. Create the fish in side profile facing right, with a rounded spotted head, large glossy black eye, pouty lips, and translucent flowing fins. Use a saturated deep magenta pink palette with darker black speckles across the head and upper body. Show exactly 6 prominent fin elements: 1 large rippling tail fin trailing left, 1 top dorsal fin, 1 long lower flowing fin, 1 rounded gill-side fin near the head, and 2 thin dangling ventral fins. Add a centered opaque rectangular censor block over the middle of the fish body, colored dark burgundy, with sharp edges and no text. Composition should be wide horizontal, minimal, isolated on pure black, with no extra objects, no reflection, and no typography.
